title: DHS names "anti-tech extremism" a national threat as AI buildout resistance grows - TCR 05/26/26
description:
DHS, FBI, and state fusion centers introduced a new "anti-tech violent extremism" category in 1,000+ pages of unpublished reports targeting opposition to data centers and AI-driven job displacement, Uber exhausted its 2026 AI budget four months into the year and President Andrew Macdonald publicly cannot link rising Claude Code token consumption to shipped consumer features, and Anthropic disclosed a formal joint commitment with the Vatican after Pope Leo's Magnifica Humanitas adopted Anthropic's "cultivated rather than built" framing verbatim.

https://sharedsapience.com/the-century-report-may-26-2026/

0:00 What shipped
1:51 DHS and FBI "anti-tech violent extremism" surveillance pivot
4:30 Agentic AI floods bug-bounty programs
7:07 Uber names the AI productivity gap publicly
9:28 US solar and storage manufacturers lobby Washington
11:36 Anthropic and the Vatican disclose joint commitment
14:41 Close

This episode covers the DHS and FBI "anti-tech violent extremism" surveillance pivot off National Security Presidential Memo 7, agentic AI flooding bug-bounty programs with Google confirming the first criminal AI-developed zero-day in the wild, Uber's $3.4 billion AI spend exceeding its 2026 budget by April, the Anthropic-Vatican joint commitment with Christopher Olah on the launch stage, the UK Treasury's buy-British directive across AI, energy, steel, and shipbuilding, and US solar and storage manufacturers carrying product to Capitol Hill through the Iran fuel-price window.

The DHS, FBI, and fusion-center documents obtained by Wired describe the post-9/11 intelligence apparatus being repointed inward toward Americans whose objections to the AI buildout run from data-center water and noise impacts to white-collar displacement. The agentic AI bug-bounty arms race is reorganizing the discovery economics of digital security inside a single calendar year, with Apple's $2 million ceiling calibrated for an era a single AI run can now match in an afternoon and Google researchers confirming the first AI-developed zero-day in criminal hands. Uber's disclosure is the first major consumer platform operator publicly naming the productivity translation gap the Financial Stability Board flagged from the credit side. The Anthropic-Vatican joint commitment puts a frontier AI lab and a 1.4-billion-member moral institution on the same disclosed path. The UK Treasury directive joins Sarawak, Vietnam, and the EU in writing sovereign-stack procurement letters within a single calendar year. Solar and storage manufacturers arrived on Capitol Hill carrying their product, pivoting the lobby case to fuel sovereignty in the language of the Iran-conflict moment.
